title: linaria khalkhalensis
intro: Linaria khalkhalensis, also known as Persian toadflax, is a flowering plant species in the figwort family. Traditionally, it has been used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Linaria khalkhalensis typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as tea or used in topical applications.
